message:
test(orchestrator,error,model,accelerate,robot,process): expand unit test coverage across core modules

orchestrator.rs (+244 lines):
- Acceleration fence cancellation payload tests
- Tiny budget max guard edge case
- Cancel/uncancel lifecycle verification
- No-deadline token behavior
- Stage latency profile validation
- Finalizer registry (Process and Custom variants)
- Budget-exceeded continuation semantics

error.rs (+81 lines):
- Edge cases: empty command string, zero timeout, empty path, max budget
- Verified source() returns None for all error variants

model.rs (+94 lines):
- Round-trip serde tests for SpeakerConstraints, TranscribeRequest stdin,
  PunctuationConfig, SourceSeparationConfig, RunReport evidence

accelerate.rs (+97 lines):
- Cancelled token handling, epsilon boundary normalization, zero-epsilon
  layer norm NaN detection, benchmark attention, GPU report notes

robot.rs (+63 lines):
- New robot-mode output format tests

replay_pack.rs (+7 lines):
- Small replay pack extension

process.rs (+24 lines):
- Minor process handling adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -106,6 +106,13 @@ fn rollout_stage_from_report(report: &RunReport) -> String {
         .iter()
         .find(|event| event.code == "backend.routing.decision_contract")
         .and_then(|event| event.payload.get("native_rollout_stage"))
+        .or_else(|| {
+            report
+                .events
+                .iter()
+                .find(|event| event.code == "backend.ok")
+                .and_then(|event| event.payload.get("native_rollout_stage"))
+        })
         .and_then(serde_json::Value::as_str)
         .map(str::to_owned)
         .unwrap_or_else(|| NativeEngineRolloutStage::Primary.as_str().to_owned())
